extDesc.message: Proactive local AI protection. Blocks malicious sites, Facebook posts, and chat scams.

transferQuestions.message:
Is any of the following true?
  • Someone on the phone is telling you to do this.
  • You are sending money to 'fix' your computer.
  • You are sending money to a government agency or police.
  • You are returning an 'accidental' overpayment.

forceProceed.message: I am paying a real bill. Let me proceed.

blockedVisual.message: 🚨 Shield blocked a malicious image post.

scanningDesc.message: Please wait, we are verifying if this page is safe for you...

marketplaceAlert.message: 🚨 WARNING: This page looks like an OLX/InPost scam! Do not click anything.
